comment.body: From the weekly post: "This is all mechanical and caps any upside for the index. Below 6024.11 the spot is in this ‘gravitational field’."  We closed at 6025.16, so one point above this level.  Still below the weekly vol-implied max of 6034.30.  But ES already has us below that 6024.11 level.  So maybe we will see at most a 10 point bounce then reversion back towards the weekly centroid of 5917.31.
